readyWork.title: Run fresh repository production-readiness audit
readyWork.scope: Run a fresh audit from current repository sources and validators; produce current risks and first implementation slices.
acceptanceCriteria: Current findings cite source files or commands.
Findings are converted into READY, BACKLOG, or BLOCKED queue items.

blockedWork.title: Collect strict production release evidence
blockedWork.reason: Target-environment egress, image provenance, live load, restore, monitoring, TLS/admission, and CI/security evidence are not available in this checkout.
acceptanceCriteria: Release gate passes without local-only mode.
blockers: External evidence not present in repository
blockedWork.nextAction: Collect real target evidence and run strict release gate flags.

standingRisks: Do not claim guaranteed inbox placement.
Do not claim 10 lakh sends in 10 hours for new or unwarmed domains.
Keep production release blocked without external evidence.
